title: polygala crista-galli
intro: Polygala crista-galli, also known as the bird's foot or snail seed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Polygalaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Polygala crista-galli include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
